task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully satisfied: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with Source and Destination fields json-tagged correctly; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server.RenameHandler in server/routes.go copies model via CopyModel, deletes source with Remove() and RemoveLayers(), returns 404 for missing source (StatusNotFound) and 409 for existing destination (StatusConflict); (4) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) present; (5) CLI rename command in cmd/cmd.go with cobra.ExactArgs(2); (6) CLI RenameHandler correctly instantiates RenameRequest and calls client.Rename; (7) No test files modified, all changes are additions only. Implementation is complete, follows existing patterns, and includes proper error handling.
